creator: siteshwar@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #18)

> 2. att/ast has not released a new release in a long time and frankly their naming/numbering of releases didn't give any comfort that they took this seriously. The fact that there were four releases in the space of two days was also a little disconcerting.

We did not choose the naming/numbering scheme for previous versions, previous maintainers were using two different schemes for version number that has been made obsolete now. We have switched to semantic versioning and it's a good thing. We did not even make a release until this week, we had only tagged relevant commits with version numbers.
